summary: Iteration 44 validation: (1) /app/backend/tests/test_sync.py — all 8 async tests PASS with zero PytestRemovedIn9Warning / async-fixture errors after switching @pytest.fixture → @pytest_asyncio.fixture on line 26. (2) Full backend regression green — 40/40 across test_llm_dispatch (6), test_llmgateway_endpoints (5), test_billing_plans (3), test_share (14), test_research_memory (6), test_research_stream (6). (3) Frontend affiliate nested rewrite — test_affiliate_rewrite_map.mjs 10/10 PASS (maybeTagBookshopUrl tags product & search URLs with ?aff/?affiliate=17338, preserves existing aff, skips non-Bookshop hosts; rewriteTextAffiliates rewrites Amazon+Bookshop URLs inside prose, preserves trailing punctuation, leaves unrelated URLs untouched; rewriteMapAffiliates walks children at every depth, tags .summary + .link, returns input immutably, handles null/string/missing fields). Legacy test_affiliate_urls.mjs 9/9 PASS — no regression. (4) Zotero binary PDF upload — test_zotero_upload.mjs 3/3 PASS (full 4-call sequence: create item → authorise → S3 → register; server dedup exists=1 short-circuits after 2 calls; empty blob rejected). Headers verified: Zotero-API-Version: 3 (line 43 zotero.js) and If-None-Match: * on both authorise+register POSTs (lines 379, 424). (5) Code review of /app/frontend/src/lib/api.js confirms all 4 AI endpoints wrap responses through rewriteMapAffiliates (lines 29, 49, 115 via finalMap in stream, 139). (6) CloudSaveMenu.jsx targetSupports accepts both 'md' AND 'pdf' for zotero (line 51); PDF branch calls saveMapToZoteroFull (line 103). (7) package.json has spark-md5: ^3.0.2 (line 58). (8) All 9 existing frontend .mjs tests (build_map_blob, cloud_save_all, dropbox_push, zotero_push, map_history, onboarding_tour_state, share_nudge_event, i18n_bundles, localized_seed) still PASS — 68 total = 6+4+3+5+9+5+3+28+5 + 10+9+3 new. (9) Live smoke: Landing (/?unlock=mind-mapper67), /tools (tools-card-llmgateway + tools-card-perplexity present), and Studio /app (api-key-status-chip visible) all load with no JS pageerrors and clean hydration. Frontend builds cleanly — no broken imports after api.js change.

critical_code_review_comments: test_sync.py needs PYTHONPATH=/app/backend to resolve 'from sync import ...' — no pytest.ini / pyproject sets rootdir/pythonpath so running 'pytest' from /app fails with ModuleNotFoundError. Non-blocking (iteration_43 hit the same thing and the review called it pre-existing). Consider adding a tiny /app/backend/conftest.py with `sys.path.insert(0, os.path.dirname(__file__))` or a pytest.ini with pythonpath=backend so test_sync.py runs from any cwd. Same applies to all other backend tests that do top-level imports like 'from sync import ...' or 'from billing import ...'.

zotero.js uploadFileAttachment builds the S3 multipart body as prefix+bytes+suffix — spark-md5 runs on the raw blob bytes (correctly, per Zotero docs) and the filesize sent in step 2 is the blob size (NOT prefix+blob+suffix size). That's right per Zotero spec, but worth a one-line comment in the code since it's easy to regress: MD5/size describe the file itself, the prefix/suffix are only for the S3 multipart envelope.

CloudSaveMenu.jsx:51 targetSupports toast wording 'Zotero accepts Markdown notes and PDF attachments' is now factually correct after this iteration — no change needed, just calling out it's no longer stale.

rewriteTextAffiliates URL_RE = /https?:\/\/[^\s<>"')]+/g intentionally stops at a closing paren — handles 'Read here (https://amazon.com/x)' cleanly but will mis-segment a URL that legitimately contains a closing paren in the path (e.g. Wikipedia-style '/wiki/Foo_(bar)'). Real Amazon/Bookshop URLs don't contain literal ')' so this is fine for the affiliate use-case, but if the helper is ever re-used for general URL tagging it should be revisited. Mentioning so future iterations don't hit surprise.

rewriteMapAffiliates does a structuredClone-equivalent recursive copy (children are mapped) — confirmed immutable by test 'rewriteMapAffiliates walks children ... Immutability — original untouched'. Good pattern.

test_zotero_upload.mjs node warning: 'Module type of file:///app/frontend/src/lib/zotero.js is not specified and it doesn\'t parse as CommonJS' — zero functional impact, tests still pass. To eliminate: add '"type": "module"' to /app/frontend/package.json OR rename test files to .cjs. CRA build uses its own webpack pipeline so this only affects ad-hoc node-on-ESM test runs. Low priority cosmetic.

No data-testid on CloudSaveMenu's format dropdown rows in the review — rely on visible text. If the team wants Playwright E2E coverage of the zotero-pdf path, add data-testid='cloud-save-format-pdf' and data-testid='cloud-save-target-zotero' to the respective buttons/options.
test_credentials: App gate: ?unlock=mind-mapper67 (from /app/frontend/.env:REACT_APP_UNLOCK_KEY). Zotero upload test uses a fetch mock (no real API key). /app/memory/test_credentials.md currently has no user credentials — only the unlock gate is needed for this iteration.
seed_data_creation: None — test_sync.py creates and drops its own db via fixture (db[DB_NAME+'_sync_tests']), cleaned up on teardown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests MUST be run from /app/backend (or with PYTHONPATH=/app/backend) because there is no conftest.py/pytest.ini configuring pythonpath. Commands that worked this iteration: `cd /app/backend && PYTHONPATH=/app/backend pytest tests/test_sync.py -v`. Iteration 43 testing agent noted test_sync.py was failing with 8 ERRORs due to deprecated async fixture pattern; this iteration fixed it via @pytest_asyncio.fixture and all 8 pass cleanly. Unrelated pre-existing failures in tests/test_mindmapper_api.py::TestCorpusSearch (arxiv network) and tests/test_share_unfurl.py (external HTTP probing) are NOT in scope for this review and remain as-is (not re-verified). Frontend route for Studio remains /app (NOT /studio). spark-md5 is now a runtime dependency — any future refactor of zotero.js should keep it; Web Crypto has no MD5.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All three iteration goals delivered correctly: (a) pytest-asyncio fix via @pytest_asyncio.fixture restores 8 sync tests to green with no warnings; (b) affiliate rewrites now walk nested node trees via rewriteMapAffiliates applied at every AI endpoint's return path in api.js; (c) Zotero PDF binary push uses the 4-call MD5 protocol with correct headers and proper dedup short-circuit. All 48 backend + 68 frontend tests pass.
